title: CustodyTransferEvent
description: A Proof of Handover (PoH) event capturing the transfer of physical custody between two actors in a logistics chain.

eventTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the handover occurred.

epcList.description: List of waybill URNs whose custody is being transferred.

readPoint.description: GPS coordinates where the handover took place.

giverName.description: Full name of the party giving custody. Present for custodian (non-platform) givers.

giverPhone.description: Phone number of the giver. Present for custodian givers.

receiverName.description: Full name of the person receiving custody.

receiverPhone.description: Phone number of the receiver. Used to create a custodian OTP session for non-final receivers.

receiverIdScheme.description: The identity scheme used to verify the receiver (e.g. ng:bvn, gh:ghana-card, ke:national-id, za:said, rw:national-id).

idVerified.description: Whether the receiver's government ID was successfully verified against the national registry.

idOverride.description: Whether the ID verification step was bypassed because the verification provider was unavailable.

idOverrideReason.description: The reason recorded when idOverride is true. The operator accepts liability for the override.

custodianSessionId.description: ID of the OTP-verified custodian session that initiated this handover, if the giver is a non-platform handler.

evidenceWeight.description: Scored strength of the identity evidence captured at this handover. very_high = ID verified + GPS. high = ID verified. medium = ID provider unavailable, idOverride reason recorded. low = final receiver (no ID required).

proofHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest used as the immutable Proof of Handover.

proofAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to compute proofHash.
